title: Astronomy and Space Science Connections Quiz

listOfQuestions.question: Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: A natural satellite orbiting a planet or smaller body?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: A rocky small body orbiting the Sun?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: An icy small body that can form a tail near the Sun?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: A huge system of stars, gas, dust, and dark matter?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: A cloud of gas and dust in space?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: The distance light travels in one year?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: The curved path of one body around another?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: The attraction between masses?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: An instrument that collects and focuses electromagnetic radiation?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: Studying light by separating it into wavelengths?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: Stretching of light toward longer wavelengths?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: A planet orbiting a star outside the Solar System?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: A powerful stellar explosion?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: A region where gravity prevents light from escaping?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: A dense remnant of a massive star?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: A dense remnant left by a Sun-like star?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: Charged particles flowing outward from the Sun?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: The region where liquid water could exist on a planet's surface?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: A luminous sphere of plasma powered by nuclear fusion?
Which Astronomy and Space Science concept is described by this clue: A large body orbiting a star that clears its orbital neighborhood?
